Default Prove Up In Scd
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Appearances:
Fredrik Emilson, Esq. for Plaintiff Bessie Chan, also present, was sworn & examined.
Defendant Evelyn Davidson did not appear.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant:
Back Rent in the amount of $7,488.00
Attorney's fees of $8,027.50
Costs of $1,510.20
For the total of $16,985.70.

Plaintiff to prepare and submit judgment for money damages only.
